input.prompt:

Save the .mmd file to the ./droptarget/ directory.
For example: ./droptarget/DropTarget.mmd

SCOPE: Your working directory is the current directory. Only access files within this directory. Do NOT access any other directories.

1→{
     2→  "class": {
     3→    "name": "DropTarget",
     4→    "signature": "public class DropTarget extends Object implements DropTargetListener, Serializable",
     5→    "description": "The DropTarget is associated with a Component when that Component wishes to accept drops during Drag and Drop operations. Each DropTarget is associated with a FlavorMap. The default FlavorMap hereafter designates the FlavorMap returned by SystemFlavorMap.getDefaultFlavorMap().",

The Component will receive drops only if it is enabled.",

    18→        {

    note right of maybeActive
        Initial state: active status unknown (depends on constructor parameter).
        setActive(true) transitions to Active; setActive(false) to Inactive.
    end note

    note right of Active
        DropTarget is accepting drops.
        dragEnter, dragOver, dropActionChanged, dragExit, drop have full effect.
        addDropTargetListener throws TooManyListenersException if listener already registered.
    end note

    note right of Inactive
        DropTarget is not accepting drops.
        dragEnter, dragOver, dropActionChanged, dragExit, drop have no effect.
    end note
